what_it_does: Records metadata for a single image attachment in the design-assets channel, linking it to an image asset target.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
standouts: Target points to an icon asset named Icon_Update via an image:// URI
Attachment is categorized under the design-assets channel
concerns: No description, dimensions, MIME type, file size, or author
Target URI cannot be resolved from this file alone
notes: A sparse ledger entry that registers an image icon asset named Icon_Update in the design-assets channel.
questions: What file or resource does image://design-assets/icons/Icon_Update resolve to?
What are the dimensions, format, and usage context of Icon_Update?
Who added this attachment and why?
intention_signals: Catalog image attachments in a channel so design assets can be referenced by stable IDs and URIs.
novelty: Uses an image:// URI scheme and an att- prefixed identifier for channel attachments.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped identifier and target pointer for an image asset in the design-assets channel, supporting lookup and linking.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-7d0f8e75 in the design-assets channel pointing to the image asset image://design-assets/icons/Icon_Update with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Register an image icon asset in the design-assets channel for reference and tracking.
